mapper.delete: delete from tbl_block where blocker_id = #{blockerId} and blocked_id = #{blockedId}
mapper.select: select b.id, b.blocker_id, b.blocked_id, b.created_datetime, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle from tbl_block b join tbl_member m on b.blocked_id = m.id where b.blocker_id = #{blockerId} order by b.created_datetime desc
select exists( select 1 from tbl_block where (blocker_id = #{memberId1} and blocked_id = #{memberId2}) or (blocker_id = #{memberId2} and blocked_id = #{memberId1}) )
